message:
test(scan): add additional git-diff E2E integration tests

Add comprehensive tests for git-diff edge cases:
- Empty diff returns empty list
- Renamed files show new name only
- Deleted files are skipped
- Added files are included
- Binary files excluded

Part of git_safety_guard-scan.5.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
